title: cajanus indicus var. flavus
intro: Cajanus indicus var. flavus, also known as yellow pigeon pea or yellow gram, is a variety of the pigeon pea plant that is widely cultivated in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help prevent and treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cajanus indicus var. flavus include lowering cholesterol levels, managing diabetes, and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, which can be used to make herbal remedies for a variety of health issues.
